title: News Brief
scenario: Summarize a recent news story, including the main points and key takeaways. The summary should be 1-2 paragraphs long, written in the present tense.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary adheres to the word limit and tense requirements.
Verify that the summary includes the main points and key takeaways from the news story.
Check if the tone of the summary matches a conversational tone.
